message:
fix: improve test robustness, scoped locking, and minor code cleanups

Six files with independent small fixes:

bulkhead: Simplified the spawn_blocking result handling — collapsed the
Ok(Ok(value)) and Ok(Err(e)) match arms into a single Ok(inner_result) arm
using inner_result.map_err(BulkheadError::Inner), removing one arm.

websocket/split: Scoped the mutex guard in the roundtrip test so the lock on
shared.write_buf is released before the buffer is used for decoding, preventing
a potential deadlock if the test panics while holding the lock.

choreography/pipeline: Fixed doc-test assertion from "async fn test_" to
"fn test_" to match the actual code generated by ProjectionCompiler.

watch_stream: Replaced four tx.send().expect() calls in tests with
assert_with_log! macro invocations for consistent test diagnostics and
structured logging output, matching the project's testing conventions.

epoll: Made dup_fd_at_least() resilient to low RLIMIT_NOFILE values on test
hosts. Instead of a single fcntl(F_DUPFD_CLOEXEC) at fd 50000, the function
now tries progressively lower minima (50000 → 16384 → 4096 → 1024 → 256),
stopping at the first successful dup. Only EINVAL triggers fallback; other
errors still panic immediately.

property_ws_frame: Excluded RFC 6455 §7.4.1 reserved close codes (1005, 1006,
1015) from the proptest generator via arb_sendable_close_code(), preventing
spurious failures when the WebSocket implementation correctly rejects these
internal-only codes. Added proptest regression seeds documenting the 1005
shrink case that originally exposed this.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc bd886402f739b1ee72c024c17b4138106ed0dfa23fc7333da91ccb838f3e5972 # shrinks to code = 1005
+cc aaef9aa6da4d35fd39ae7a8b72e49751eb6011b6a04c21637b20b7338e1d33cc # shrinks to code = 1005, reason = ""
